questions: Where is your hometown?
What do you like most about your hometown?
Has your hometown changed much since you were a child?
Would you recommend your hometown as a place to visit? Why?
Do you work or are you a student?
What do you enjoy most about your work?
Is your job stressful? Why or why not?
What would you like to change about your job in the future?
What hobbies do you have?
How did you become interested in this hobby?
Do you think hobbies are important? Why?
Have your hobbies changed over the years?
What kind of food do you like to eat?
Do you prefer eating at home or in restaurants?
Have your eating habits changed since you were a child?
Do you think traditional food in your country is healthy?
What kind of music do you like to listen to?
When do you usually listen to music?
Have you ever learned to play a musical instrument?
Do you think music is important in people's lives?
How often do you use a smartphone?
What apps do you use most frequently?
Do you think people rely too much on technology nowadays?
How has technology changed your daily life in the past five years?

part2.title: Describe a skill you would like to learn
bullets: why you want to learn it
and explain how learning this skill would benefit you

part2.title: Describe a place you want to visit in the future
bullets: how you first heard about it
and explain why you want to visit this place

part2.title: Describe a person who has influenced you
bullets: what they have done that influenced you
and explain why their influence has been important

part2.title: Describe an important decision you have made
bullets: and explain how you feel about the decision now

part2.title: Describe a book that influenced you
bullets: and explain how it influenced you

part2.title: Describe a memorable journey you have taken
bullets: what you did during the journey
and explain why this journey was memorable

part2.title: Describe a gift you received that you really liked
bullets: and explain why you liked it so much

questions: What skills do you think are most important for young people today?
Should schools teach more practical skills, or focus on academic subjects?
How has technology changed the way people learn new skills?
Do you think it's better to learn from books or from experience?
Why do you think people enjoy travelling to other countries?
What are the benefits of experiencing different cultures?
How has tourism affected local communities in your country?
Do you think virtual travel could replace real travel in the future?
What factors should people consider before making important decisions?
Is it better to make decisions quickly or take time to think?
How can young people improve their decision-making skills?
Should parents make important decisions for their children?
How important is music in people's daily lives today?
Has the way people listen to music changed in recent years?
Should traditional music be preserved? Why?
Do you think live concerts will still be popular in the future?
How has technology changed the way families communicate?
Do you think social media has more positive or negative effects on young people?
Will artificial intelligence replace many jobs in the future?
What can governments do to make sure technology benefits everyone?
Why is it important to preserve cultural traditions?
Do you think modern lifestyles are erasing traditional customs?
What role should schools play in teaching cultural heritage?
How do traditions in your country differ from those in other countries?
